1.error: scale 3 too generous — T1 is a heavy-braking 2nd-gear left at the top of the Senna S, scale 2

2.error: scale 4 slightly high — the right-hand exit of the Senna S is a medium-speed compromise corner, scale 3

6.error: scale 5 wrong — Ferradura ('horseshoe') is a braking, medium-speed right that tightens on exit, scale 3

7.error: scale 5 wrong — Laranjinha is the tight slow right at the end of the Ferradura horseshoe, 2nd/3rd gear, scale 2

8.error: scale 5 slightly high — the downhill right before Pinheirinho is a genuine direction change (~100°), scale 4

9.error: scale 6 wrong — Pinheirinho is a proper medium-speed 90°+ left, not a kink; scale 3

10.error: scale 6 badly wrong — Bico de Pato is a near-hairpin right and one of the slowest corners on the lap, scale 2

11.error: scale 5 slightly high — Mergulho is a fast committed left but loaded and downhill, scale 4

12.error: scale 3 slightly generous — Junção is a slow 2nd/3rd-gear left that sets up the entire climb to the line, scale 2

15.error: scale 6 slightly low — Arquibancadas is a long sustained flat-out left onto the pit straight, more a scale 5 sweep than a deflection

gp.errors_summary: Numbering, markers, directions and locations all check out against the outline, but severity scales in the infield are badly inflated — T6, T7, T9 and T10 (Ferradura, Laranjinha, Pinheirinho, Bico de Pato) are marked 5-6 when they are medium-to-slow corners (scales 2-3).
